title: Mapping of heart tissue using Visium Spatial Gene Expression for FFPE
author: Natalia-Del Pilar Vanegas

steps.title: 10 cycles • Platform
steps.instruction: 10 cycles • Platform: Illumina NovaSeq 6000, NextSeq 2000, or equivalent • Minimum depth: 25,000 readsper tissue-covered spot

steps.title: Data Processing • Process FASTQs with...
steps.instruction: Data Processing • Process FASTQs with Space Ranger (spaceranger count) using GRCh38 and the Visium FFPE probe set. • Confirm spatial barcode–image alignment via Loupe Browser or Space Ranger HTML summary. • Archive raw FASTQs and Space Ranger outputs (filtered_feature_bc_matrix/, spatial/, tissue_positions.csv).

steps.title: Library Construction (CG000407 Rev D) Follow...
steps.instruction: Library Construction (CG000407 Rev D) Follow CG000407 precisely for all reagent volumes, incubation times, and thermocycler programs. 3.1 Probe Hybridization %s %s 3.2 Probe Ligation %s %s 3.3 Probe Release & Extension %s %s 3.4 PCRAmplification & Indexing %s %s

steps.title: Deparaffinization, H&E, Imaging & Decrosslinking (per...
steps.instruction: Deparaffinization, H&E, Imaging & Decrosslinking (per CG000409 Rev D) NOTE: Run all steps on a test slide first. Capture brightfield TIFF image before decrosslinking — required for Space Ranger alignment. %s %s
